channel.title: U.S. Hegemony on PepsFeeder
channel.description: Recent content in U.S. Hegemony on PepsFeeder

item.title: Key Global Shifts in Geopolitics, Political Economy, and Defense Technology
item.author: support@pepsfeeder.com (Chris Mano)
item.description: The world today is experiencing simultaneous upheavals across multiple dimensions. In the political realm, the unipolar moment of U.S. hegemony is fading, giving way to an “interregnum” of competing great powers.
